# SEARCHTOOLBOX — LLMs.txt
# https://seo-swiss-knife-landing-1.vercel.app/llms.txt

## Product
Name: SEARCHTOOLBOX (Chrome Web Store: "SEARCHTOOLBOX — SEO & GEO All-in-One")
Type: Browser Extension (Chrome, Edge, Brave, Arc)
Price: Free to Start (10 AI Credits) / Premium Plans Available
URL: https://seo-swiss-knife-landing-1.vercel.app
Category: SEO Tools / Browser Extensions / AI Assistants

## What it does
SEARCHTOOLBOX is the most complete on-page SEO Chrome extension with an embedded Personal AI Agent.
It replaces 10+ separate SEO extensions with a single browser sidebar and provides context-aware AI audits.

## Core capabilities
- **Personal SEO Agent**: Context-aware AI that reads the live DOM, understands page structure, and provides actionable fixes.
- **Page Overview**: Title, meta description, canonical, robots, Open Graph, Twitter Card analysis.
- **Heading Hierarchy**: Visual H1–H6 tree with error detection and depth analysis.
- **Schema Inspector**: JSON-LD, Microdata, RDFa validation with syntax highlighting.
- **Hreflang Auditor**: Deep audit of return links, x-default, and regional mismatches.
- **Redirect Tracer**: Complete chain tracing with response times and loop detection.
- **Robots & Crawl**: Robots.txt and X-Robots-Tag checker with bot simulation.
- **Image SEO**: Comprehensive image audit with CSV/ZIP exports.
- **SERP VPN**: Geo-simulate Google results from 50+ countries.
- **JS Render Comparison**: Compare pure HTML vs. rendered DOM for indexability.
- **Technical Tools**: Cookie editor, cache cleaner, user agent switcher, device emulation.

## AI Agent Details
- **Context Awareness**: Reads the live page directly in the browser.
- **3 Modes**: Beginner (learn basics), Intermediate (technical details), Expert (deep audits).
- **Personalized**: Remembers interaction history and adapts to site-specific context.

## Pricing
- **Free**: 10 AI Credits, Basic Audit, Schema & Redirect tools.
- **Pro**: Unlimited AI Credits, Deep Technical Audit, Priority Support, SERP VPN.
- **Team**: Shared history, 5+ seats, API access.

## Brand
- Product Name: SEARCHTOOLBOX
- Domain: seo-swiss-knife-landing-1.vercel.app
- Icon: Multi-colored Pixel Heart
- Status: Public V1.0 (Public Beta completed)
